item.title: Memory lifecycle management — structured knowledge graph
steps: Define StructuredMemory types: preferences (hierarchical), relationships (cross-linked), domain_expertise, context
Implement memory ingestion: parse raw conversation logs into structured knowledge entries
Implement hot tier: recent structured knowledge, <100KB, <7 days
Implement warm tier: LLM-summarized knowledge, PII-aware, <90 days
Implement cold tier: further compressed, PII-masked, >90 days (or delete per policy)
Implement tier transitions with local model summarization
Implement background reflection: analyze existing memories for new connections during idle time
Add memory section to status dashboard and doctor checks
acceptanceCriteria: Raw conversations are transformed into structured knowledge (not stored as flat logs)
Hot -> warm tier transition summarizes while preserving key information
Warm -> cold tier further compresses and masks PII
Background reflection detects and proposes new connections
All summarization runs on local models by default
Memory health is reported in doctor and status
